title: Yuki's Sleepy Star Wishes
synopsis: Little Yuki feels restless at bedtime and discovers the magical comfort of making wishes on sleepy stars, learning that nighttime feelings are normal and beautiful.

pages.text: Yuki sat on her soft bed, but sleep felt far away. Her heart felt wiggly and restless, like butterflies dancing inside her chest.

illustration.description: A gentle girl with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sitting on a cozy bed with purple blankets, surrounded by soft watercolor gradients of purple and blue, with floating clouds and gentle moonlight streaming through a window
illustration.alt: Yuki sitting on her bed looking restless at bedtime

pages.text: "I don't feel sleepy," Yuki whispered to her teddy bear. "My feelings are all mixed up like colorful paint swirls."

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes holding a fluffy teddy bear close to her chest, with dreamy purple and blue gradients swirling around them like gentle emotions, glowing stars beginning to appear in the soft watercolor background
illustration.alt: Yuki talking to her teddy bear about her mixed-up feelings

pages.text: Mama came and sat beside her. "Sometimes our hearts feel full of different feelings at bedtime," she said gently. "That's okay, little star."

illustration.description: A caring mother sitting next to Yuki who has straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes, both bathed in gentle moonlight with floating clouds around them, rendered in soft watercolor with an ethereal atmosphere and pastel palette
illustration.alt: Mama comforting Yuki on the bed

pages.text: Mama pointed to the window where sleepy stars twinkled softly. "See how the stars glow gently? They hold all our bedtime wishes."

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes and her mother looking out a window at glowing stars in the night sky, with soft watercolor dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds, and gentle moonlight creating an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Yuki and Mama looking at twinkling stars through the window

pages.text: "Can I make a wish?" asked Yuki. "Of course," smiled Mama. Yuki closed her eyes and wished for peaceful dreams and happy morning hugs.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes with her eyes gently closed, making a wish, surrounded by glowing stars that seem to dance around her in soft watercolor style with dreamy purple and blue gradients and an ethereal atmosphere
illustration.alt: Yuki making a wish with her eyes closed as stars glow around her

pages.text: As Yuki made her wish, her restless feelings became soft and dreamy. The sleepy stars seemed to wrap her in gentle, twinkling comfort.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes peacefully lying in bed with a serene expression, surrounded by glowing stars, floating clouds, and dreamy purple and blue gradients in soft watercolor, with gentle moonlight creating a magical, sleepy atmosphere
illustration.alt: Yuki feeling peaceful and sleepy surrounded by magical starlight

pages.text: "Good night, sleepy stars," Yuki whispered as her eyes grew heavy. "Thank you for listening to my heart." And with that, she drifted into the sweetest dreams.

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes sleeping peacefully with a gentle smile, covered in soft blankets, with glowing stars floating around her like guardians, rendered in soft watercolor with dreamy purple and blue gradients, floating clouds, and gentle moonlight in an ethereal, pastel atmosphere
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping peacefully with stars watching over her

metadata.illustrationStyle: soft watercolor, dreamy purple and blue gradients, glowing stars, round sleepy faces, floating clouds, gentle moonlight, ethereal atmosphere, pastel palette

questions.question: How did Yuki feel at the beginning of the story?
questions.explanation: Yuki felt restless and wiggly, like butterflies dancing in her chest.

questions.question: What did Mama show Yuki to help her feel better?
questions.explanation: Mama showed Yuki the sleepy stars that twinkled softly and held bedtime wishes.

questions.question: What did Yuki wish for?
choices: Peaceful dreams and happy morning hugs
questions.explanation: Yuki wished for peaceful dreams and happy morning hugs.

questions.question: How did Yuki feel after making her wish?
questions.explanation: After making her wish, Yuki's restless feelings became soft and dreamy.
